name: Curried Vegies
recipeIngredient: 2 3/4 teaspoons semi-hot curry powder (a good blend)
Chopped vegetables (celery, carrots, green pepper, canned tomatoes, mushrooms, eggplant, or whatever is available)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a non-stick pot, add the chopped onions and garlic. Stir until lightly browned.
2. Add a little water and deglaze the pan by scraping up any brown bits from the bottom.
3. Add the curry powder and stir well. Cook for about five minutes until the onions are soft, adding more water as needed to prevent burning.
4. Add the chopped vegetables and apple juice, then cook until the vegetables are tender. If desired, add a splash of water during cooking if the mixture looks too dry.
